title: Software Engineer - Early Career
description:
Deine Rolle im Team

  • We're looking for brilliant graduates (or soon-to-be) willing to move their first steps in the world of software engineering (back-end and full-stack) and to contribute directly to the development and advancement of the Dynatrace platform.
  • In this role you will:
  • Be part of Dynatrace Talent Academy: an ambitious cohort of like-minded colleagues who start their Dev career at Dynatrace together, fostering a strong environment for peer-to-peer learning and collaboration.
  • Strengthen your tech knowledge, work on exciting projects, and get familiar with Dev life at Dynatrace (tooling, agile methods, code of conduct, etc.) before transition into one of our Dev Teams in Linz.
  • Collaborate with experienced Software Engineers as mentors, getting continuous guidance from our Academy Program Managers.

Unser Angebot

  • The role will be based in Linz, please note the whole onboarding phase in the Talent Academy (aprox. 6 months) will be held in Hagenberg.
  • This is a full-time, permanent position for early career professionals (max. 1-2 year of experience after the graduation).
  • Working models offering you the flexibility you need, combining home and in-office work (2 days / week).
  • A globally unique and tailor-made career development program based on yearly reviews, recognizing your potential, promoting your strengths, and supporting you in achieving your career goals.
  • The salary range for this position based on full-time employment (38.5 h/week) goes from 46000€ to 58000€, depending on your experience and qualifications.

Technologien und Skills

  • Java

Unsere Erwartungen an dich:

Qualifikationen

  • Solid knowledge of any Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) stack, with preference accorded to Java.
  • Growing interest in, or familiarity with, Generative AI and its emerging applications in software development, as we place increasing attention on AI-driven capabilities.
  • Being a team player with a proactive approach, and solid problem-solving skills.
  • Good English communication skills.

Ausbildung

  • (Almost) graduated in a BSc / MSc Degree in Computer Science, AI or related fields.

Benefits

  • Team Events
  • Home Office
  • Klimaticket
